title: Harbinger (landing ship)
content:
{{Top|ga|leg|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Harbinger}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Harbinger_tank.png]] |name=''Harbinger'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]]{{CSWECite|II|17|Harbinger (1)}} |line= |model= |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem=Supercharged [[Hyperdrive/Legends|light drive]] |poweroutput= |power=7 [[Power core/Legends|power cores]] |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=*12 large [[Turret/Legends|turrets]] *Multiple [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]][[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *1 prismatic [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] |complement=Several [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[Tank/Legends|tanks]] and [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] |bays=2[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Landing craft/Legends|Landing craft]] |commission= |destroyed=[[22 BBY/Legends|21.9 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Dark Reaper crisis]], during which the ''Harbinger'' is destroyed, to [[22 BBY|21.9 BBY]], or one [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] |retired= |battles=[[Battle on Alaris]] |affiliation=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |navy= |fleet= |owners=[[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Master, what is that thing?''"
"''I'm not sure, but it can't be good.|Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi|audio=Anakin-What-is-that-thing.flac|}} The '''''Harbinger''''' was a large experimental [[Landing craft/Legends|landing ship]] designed to conquer and hold [[Planet/Legends|planets]] for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Custom-built by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]] for [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] of the Confederacy, the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] boasted a compartmentalized efficiency that allowed it to deploy [[Army/Legends|armies]] within [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]], and its supercharged [[Hyperdrive/Legends|light drive]] made it perfect for invading unsuspecting [[Star system/Legends|star systems]]. The ''Harbinger'' was deployed during a [[Battle on Alaris|battle]] on [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]], part of the [[Dark Reaper crisis]], itself a campaign within the larger Clone Wars. It was used by the Separatists to occupy the [[Moon/Legends|moon]], though it was destroyed by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] using a [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tank]]. ==Description== {{Quote|Anakin, it's powering up its main cannons. Look out!|Obi-Wan Kenobi|audio=Kenobi-Look-out.flac|}} [[File:Harbinger-firing.png|thumb|left|250px|The ''Harbinger'' fires its prismatic turbolaser.]] The ''Harbinger'' was a [[Landing craft/Legends|landing ship]] that was custom-made by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]] for [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].{{CSWECite|I|198–199|Dooku, Count}} A large experimental design meant to conquer and hold [[Planet/Legends|planets]], the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was equipped with a supercharged [[Hyperdrive/Legends|light drive]] that made it ideal for invading unsuspecting [[Star system/Legends|star systems]]. It also had seven [[Power core/Legends|power cores]] on its underside. Brown in [[Color/Legends|color]], it had two [[Hangar/Legends|cargo bays]] that could be used to deploy [[Ground Armored Tank]]s, and it was capable of storing several [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[Tank/Legends|tanks]] and [[Walker/Legends|walkers]]. Thanks to its compartmental efficiency, the craft was able to deploy [[Army/Legends|armies]] within [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]]. The ship was armed with twelve large [[Turret/Legends|turrets]] around its exterior, along with multiple [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]]. It also had a prismatic [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] that allowed it to fire sustained beams in several directions simultaneously. ==History== {{Quote|We've got to destroy that thing! Spread out! I'll try to distract it.|Obi-Wan Kenobi|audio=Kenobi-Spread-out.flac|}} In [[22 BBY/Legends|21.9 BBY]], one [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], which marked the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and Confederacy of Independent Systems, Dooku and the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] used the ''Harbinger'' to [[Battle on Alaris|invade]] the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] in the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]]. Having recently [[Conquest of Raxus Prime|captured]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] on [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]], Dooku brought Skywalker to Alaris to test the [[Force Harvester]], an ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] artifact that drained [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] from living beings and used that energy to power the [[Dark Reaper]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. [[File:Battle-of-Alaris.png|thumb|right|250px|Anakin Skywalker destroys the ''Harbinger''.]] However, Skywalker managed to escape and contacted the Republic. The [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan's]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], soon arrived on the moon with Republic reinforcements and helped defend a nearby [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Wookiee village (Alaris Prime)|village]]. After defeating the Separatist forces, the two Jedi departed down a canyon in [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tanks]] to locate and destroy the source of the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] forces. While in the canyon, the Jedi encountered the ''Harbinger'', which began attacking them with its prismatic turbolaser. As the Jedi continued their attack on the ship, Ground Assault Tanks deployed from the cargo bays on either side of the ''Harbinger''. Skywalker eventually defeated the ship by using his [[Hovertank/Legends|fighter tank]] to destroy its main turbolaser, causing the ''Harbinger'' to explode. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Harbinger'' features in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] from developer [[Pandemic Studios]], in which the ship was used as the final enemy boss in the level "Mission 10: The Liberation of Kashyyyk." ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Harbinger (landing ship)}} *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] {{1stm|[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]]}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Starships of the Confederacy of Independent Systems]]
